Now I have a good understanding of the opencode design language:

1. **Color palette**: Based on the opencode theme and Nord theme:
   - Background: `#2E3440` (nord0) - dark blue-gray
   - Panel background: `#3B4252` (nord1)
   - Element background: `#434C5E` (nord2)
   - Border: `#4C566A` (nord3)
   - Text: `#D8DEE9` (nord4) - light gray
   - Primary/Accent: `#88C0D0` (nord8) - cyan/teal
   - Secondary: `#81A1C1` (nord9) - blue
   - Success: `#A3BE8C` (nord14) - green
   - Error: `#BF616A` (nord11) - red
   - Warning: `#EBCB8B` (nord13) - yellow

2. **Design style**:
   - Clean, minimal, dark theme
   - Good use of borders and panels
   - Monospace for code/data
   - Sans-serif for general text
   - Subtle color differentiation

3. **The TUI screenshot** shows:
   - Dark background with a chat-like interface
   - User messages in one style, assistant in another
   - Tool calls shown inline

Let me now redesign the analytics site with an opencode-inspired dark theme. I'll rewrite the CSS to match the Nord-based opencode color scheme and give it a terminal-inspired feel.

Key design decisions:
- Dark background (#2E3440)
- Panels/cards with slightly lighter backgrounds (#3B4252)
- Borders (#4C566A)
- Text (#D8DEE9 / #ECEFF4)
- Accent colors (cyan #88C0D0, blue #81A1C1, green #A3BE8C)
- Chat messages styled like the TUI
- Monospace for data, sans-serif for UI
- Clean, minimal, professional

Let me write the complete redesign.
writecompletedtmp/opencode_analytics_v6.py▶
Input
{
  "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport os, json, re, html, sqlite3\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom collections import defaultdict, Counter\n\nLOG_DIR = Path(\"/root/.local/share/opencode/log\")\nDB_PATH = Path(\"/root/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db\")\nOUTPUT_DIR = Path(\"/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site\")\nOUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Nord/opencode-inspired color scheme \u2500\u2500\n# bg=#2E3440  panel=#3B4252  element=#434C5E  border=#4C566A\n# text=#D8DEE9  muted=#7B88A0  primary=#88C0D0  green=#A3BE8C  red=#BF616A\n\nCSS = '''\n* { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }\nbody { font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;\n       background:#2E3440; color:#D8DEE9; min-height:100vh; }\n.container { max-width:1400px; margin:0 auto; padding:20px; }\na { color:#88C0D0; text-decoration:none; }\na:hover { text-decoration:underline; }\n\n/* Header */\n.header { background:#3B4252; border-radius:12px; padding:32px; margin-bottom:24px;\n           border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.header h1 { font-size:2.2em; font-weight:700; text-align:center; color:#88C0D0; }\n.header p { text-align:center; color:#7B88A0; margin-top:8px; font-size:0.95em; }\n.header .logo { text-align:center; font-size:0.85em; color:#7B88A0;\n                font-family:'Courier New',monospace; margin-bottom:16px;\n                white-space:pre; line-height:1.3; }\n\n/* Stats grid */\n.stats-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));\n              gap:16px; margin-bottom:24px; }\n.stat-card { background:#3B4252; border-radius:10px; padding:24px; text-align:center;\n             border:1px solid #4C566A; transition:border-color 0.2s; }\n.stat-card:hover { border-color:#88C0D0; }\n.stat-value { font-size:2.4em; font-weight:700; color:#88C0D0; }\n.stat-label { color:#7B88A0; font-size:0.9em; margin-top:4px; }\n\n/* Sections */\n.section { background:#3B4252; border-radius:10px; padding:24px; margin-bottom:24px;\n           border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.section h2 { font-size:1.2em; font-weight:600; color:#88C0D0; margin-bottom:16px;\n              padding-bottom:8px; border-bottom:1px solid #4C566A; }\n\n/* Provider cards */\n.providers-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap:12px; }\n.provider-card { background:#434C5E; border-radius:8px; padding:16px; text-align:center;\n                 border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.provider-name { font-size:1.1em; font-weight:600; color:#D8DEE9; }\n.provider-count { font-size:0.85em; color:#7B88A0; margin-top:4px; }\n\n/* Model badges */\n.models-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap:12px; }\n.model-badge { background:#434C5E; border-radius:8px; padding:14px; text-align:center;\n               border:1px solid #4C566A; color:#D8DEE9; font-weight:500; }\n.model-badge span.count { color:#88C0D0; }\n\n/* Tool badges */\n.tools-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr)); gap:10px; }\n.tool-badge { background:#434C5E; border-radius:8px; padding:12px; text-align:center;\n              border:1px solid #4C566A; font-size:0.9em; }\n.tool-badge span.tool-name { color:#D8DEE9; }\n.tool-badge span.tool-count { color:#7B88A0; }\n\n/* Session list */\n.sessions-list { background:#3B4252; border-radius:10px; padding:24px; margin-bottom:24px;\n                 border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.session-item { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;\n                padding:14px; border-bottom:1px solid #4C566A;\n                transition:background 0.2s; gap:12px; }\n.session-item:last-child { border-bottom:none; }\n.session-item:hover { background:#434C5E; border-radius:6px; }\n.session-info { flex:1; min-width:0; }\n.session-id { font-weight:600; color:#D8DEE9; margin-bottom:4px; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }\n.session-meta { font-size:0.85em; color:#7B88A0; }\n.session-stats { text-align:right; flex-shrink:0; }\n.session-messages { font-weight:600; color:#A3BE8C; }\n.session-tools { font-size:0.85em; color:#7B88A0; }\n\n/* Buttons */\n.view-button { background:#434C5E; color:#88C0D0; border:1px solid #4C566A;\n               padding:8px 18px; border-radius:6px; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.85em;\n               text-decoration:none; transition:all 0.2s; flex-shrink:0; }\n.view-button:hover { background:#4C566A; border-color:#88C0D0; text-decoration:none; }\n.back { display:inline-block; margin-top:12px; padding:8px 18px;\n        background:#434C5E; border:1px solid #4C566A; border-radius:6px;\n        color:#88C0D0; font-size:0.9em; transition:all 0.2s; }\n.back:hover { border-color:#88C0D0; text-decoration:none; }\n\n/* Chat */\n.chat { margin-top:8px; }\n.chat-msg { display:flex; gap:10px; margin-bottom:16px; }\n.chat-avatar { width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:6px; display:flex;\n               align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:700;\n               font-size:0.85em; flex-shrink:0; }\n.chat-user .chat-avatar { background:#A3BE8C; color:#2E3440; }\n.chat-assistant .chat-avatar { background:#88C0D0; color:#2E3440; }\n.chat-bubble { flex:1; background:#434C5E; border-radius:8px; padding:14px;\n               border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.chat-user .chat-bubble { border-color:#5E6A80; }\n.chat-role { font-weight:600; font-size:0.9em; color:#D8DEE9; margin-bottom:2px; }\n.chat-meta { font-size:0.8em; color:#7B88A0; margin-bottom:6px; }\n.chat-text { white-space:pre-wrap; line-height:1.7; font-size:0.95em; }\n.reasoning { cursor:pointer; color:#7B88A0; font-size:0.85em; padding:4px 0;\n             user-select:none; }\n.reasoning:hover { color:#88C0D0; }\n.reasoning-body pre { background:#2E3440; padding:10px; border-radius:6px;\n                      font-size:0.82em; color:#B7C0D0; white-space:pre-wrap;\n                      margin:6px 0; border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.tool-call { border:1px solid #4C566A; border-radius:6px; margin:6px 0; overflow:hidden; }\n.tool-header { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:7px 10px;\n               background:#2E3440; cursor:pointer; user-select:none; font-size:0.85em; }\n.tool-header:hover { background:#3B4252; }\n.tool-name { font-weight:600; color:#88C0D0; }\n.tool-status { color:#7B88A0; font-size:0.85em; }\n.tool-title { color:#7B88A0; font-size:0.85em; flex:1; overflow:hidden;\n              text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; }\n.tool-toggle { font-size:0.75em; color:#7B88A0; }\n.tool-body { padding:10px; background:#3B4252; }\n.tool-section { margin:4px 0; }\n.tool-section-title { font-size:0.75em; color:#7B88A0; font-weight:600;\n                      text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; margin-bottom:4px; }\n.tool-body pre { background:#2E3440; color:#B7C0D0; padding:8px; border-radius:4px;\n                 font-size:0.8em; overflow-x:auto; white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-all;\n                 max-height:200px; overflow-y:auto; border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n\n/* Timeline log */\n.log { background:#1E232C; border-radius:8px; padding:16px; max-height:400px;\n       overflow-y:auto; font-family:'Courier New',monospace; font-size:0.78em;\n       line-height:1.6; border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.log-line { padding:2px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2E3440; word-break:break-all; color:#7B88A0; }\n\n/* Info cards on session page */\n.info-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap:14px; margin-bottom:24px; }\n.info-card { background:#434C5E; border-radius:8px; padding:18px; border:1px solid #4C566A; }\n.info-card h3 { font-size:0.85em; color:#7B88A0; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; margin-bottom:6px; }\n.info-card p { font-size:1.5em; font-weight:700; color:#D8DEE9; }\n\n/* Footer */\n.footer { text-align:center; margin-top:24px; color:#7B88A0; font-size:0.85em;\n          padding:20px; border-top:1px solid #4C566A; }\n'''\n\ndef parse_log(lines, is_new_format=False):\n    sessions = {}\n    current_sid = None\n    for line in lines:\n        line_s = line.strip()\n        if not line_s:\n            continue\n        sid = None\n        if is_new_format:\n            m = re.search(r'session\\.id=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                sid = m.group(1)\n        else:\n            m = re.search(r'session\\.id=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                sid = m.group(1)\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\s+id=(ses_\\w+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                sid = m.group(1)\n        if sid:\n            current_sid = sid\n            if sid not in sessions:\n                sessions[sid] = {\n                    'id': sid, 'provider': None, 'model': None,\n                    'tools': set(), 'messages': 0, 'llm_calls': 0,\n                    'tool_calls': 0, 'steps': set(), 'message_ids': set(),\n                    'slug': '?', 'title': '?', 'log_sample': []\n                }\n        if not current_sid or current_sid not in sessions:\n            continue\n        s = sessions[current_sid]\n        if is_new_format:\n            m = re.search(r'message=stream\\s+providerID=(\\S+)\\s+modelID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['provider'] = m.group(1); s['model'] = m.group(2); s['llm_calls'] += 1\n            m = re.search(r'message=loop\\s+.*?step=(\\d+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['steps'].add(int(m.group(1)))\n            m = re.search(r'message=process\\s+.*?messageID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['message_ids'].add(m.group(1))\n            m = re.search(r'message=evaluated\\s+permission=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['tool_calls'] += 1\n            if 'shell tool using shell' in line_s:\n                s['tool_calls'] += 1\n            if any(kw in line_s for kw in ['message=loop','message=stream','message=evaluated','message=process','shell tool','message=cancel']):\n                log_entry = re.sub(r'timestamp=[^\\s]+\\s+level=\\S+\\s+run=\\S+\\s+','',line_s)\n                s['log_sample'].append(log_entry[:300])\n        else:\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\s+id=' + re.escape(current_sid) + r'\\s+slug=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['slug'] = m.group(1)\n                tm = re.search(r'title=(\\S+)', line_s)\n                if tm:\n                    s['title'] = tm.group(1)\n                tm2 = re.search(r'\"id\":\"([^\"]+)\"', line_s)\n                if tm2:\n                    s['model'] = tm2.group(1)\n                tm3 = re.search(r'\"providerID\":\"([^\"]+)\"', line_s)\n                if tm3:\n                    s['provider'] = tm3.group(1)\n            m = re.search(r'service=llm\\s+providerID=(\\S+)\\s+modelID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['provider'] = m.group(1); s['model'] = m.group(2); s['llm_calls'] += 1\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\.prompt\\s+.*?step=(\\d+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['steps'].add(int(m.group(1)))\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\.processor\\s+.*?messageID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['message_ids'].add(m.group(1))\n            m = re.search(r'service=permission\\s+permission=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['tool_calls'] += 1\n            if 'service=shell-tool' in line_s:\n                s['tool_calls'] += 1\n            if any(kw in line_s for kw in ['service=llm','service=session.prompt','service=permission','service=shell-tool','service=session.processor']):\n                log_entry = re.sub(r'INFO\\s+[^\\s]+\\s+\\+?\\d*ms\\s+','',line_s)\n                s['log_sample'].append(log_entry[:300])\n    for s in sessions.values():\n        if s['steps']:\n            s['messages'] = len(s['steps'])\n        elif s['message_ids']:\n            s['messages'] = len(s['message_ids'])\n        else:\n            s['messages'] = s['llm_calls']\n    return sessions\n\ndef get_db_tool_counts():\n    counts = {}\n    tools_per_session = {}\n    try:\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH))\n        cur = conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute('SELECT session_id, COUNT(*) FROM part WHERE json_extract(data, \\'$.type\\') = \\'tool\\' GROUP BY session_id')\n        for sid, cnt in cur.fetchall():\n            counts[sid] = cnt\n        cur.execute('SELECT session_id, json_extract(data, \\'$.tool\\') FROM part WHERE json_extract(data, \\'$.type\\') = \\'tool\\' AND json_extract(data, \\'$.tool\\') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id, tool_name')\n        for sid, tool_name in cur.fetchall():\n            if sid not in tools_per_session:\n                tools_per_session[sid] = set()\n            tools_per_session[sid].add(tool_name)\n        conn.close()\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"    DB error: {e}\")\n    return counts, tools_per_session\n\ndef get_all_sessions():\n    all_sessions = {}\n    for log_file in sorted(LOG_DIR.glob(\"*.log\")):\n        print(f\"  Processing {log_file.name}...\")\n        with open(log_file, 'r') as f:\n            lines = f.readlines()\n        is_new = log_file.name == \"opencode.log\"\n        parsed = parse_log(lines, is_new)\n        for sid, s in parsed.items():\n            if sid not in all_sessions:\n                all_sessions[sid] = s\n            else:\n                e = all_sessions[sid]\n                if s['slug'] and s['slug'] != '?':\n                    e['slug'] = s['slug']\n                if s['provider'] and (not e['provider'] or s['llm_calls'] > e['llm_calls']):\n                    e['provider'] = s['provider']\n                if s['model'] and (not e['model'] or s['llm_calls'] > e['llm_calls']):\n                    e['model'] = s['model']\n                e['llm_calls'] += s['llm_calls']\n                e['steps'] |= s['steps']\n                e['message_ids'] |= s['message_ids']\n                e['log_sample'] = (e['log_sample'] + s['log_sample'])[:50]\n                if e['steps']:\n                    e['messages'] = len(e['steps'])\n                elif e['message_ids']:\n                    e['messages'] = len(e['message_ids'])\n                else:\n                    e['messages'] = e['llm_calls']\n    print(\"  Querying DB for actual tool counts...\")\n    db_counts, db_tools = get_db_tool_counts()\n    for s in all_sessions.values():\n        sid = s['id']\n        s['tool_calls'] = db_counts.get(sid, 0)\n        if sid in db_tools:\n            s['tools'] = db_tools[sid]\n    return list(all_sessions.values())\n\ndef generate_stats(sessions):\n    providers = Counter(); models = Counter(); tools_used = Counter()\n    total_messages=0; total_tool_calls=0; total_llm_calls=0\n    for s in sessions:\n        providers[s['provider'] or 'Unknown'] += 1\n        models[s['model'] or 'Unknown'] += 1\n        for t in s['tools']:\n            tools_used[t] += 1\n        total_messages += s['messages']\n        total_tool_calls += s['tool_calls']\n        total_llm_calls += s['llm_calls']\n    return {'total_sessions':len(sessions),'total_messages':total_messages,\n            'total_tool_calls':total_tool_calls,'total_llm_calls':total_llm_calls,\n            'providers':providers,'models':models,'tools_used':tools_used}\n\ndef session_label(s):\n    name = s['slug'] if s['slug'] and s['slug'] != '?' else s['id'][:25]\n    return html.escape(name)\n\nLOGO = '''   ___                   _                     \n  / _ \\\\ _ __   ___   ___| | ___  _ __   ___ \n | | | | '_ \\\\ / _ \\\\ / __| |/ _ \\\\| '_ \\\\ / __|\n | |_| | |_) | (_) | (__| | (_) | | | | (__ \n  \\\\___/| .__/ \\\\___/ \\\\___|_|\\\\___/|_| |_|\\\\___|\n       |_|'''\n\n# \u2500\u2500 DB chat extraction \u2500\u2500\n\ndef get_messages_for_session(sid):\n    try:\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH))\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\n        cur = conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute('SELECT id, data, time_created FROM message WHERE session_id = ? ORDER BY time_created', (sid,))\n        messages = []\n        for row in cur.fetchall():\n            data = json.loads(row['data'])\n            role = data.get('role', 'unknown')\n            cur2 = conn.cursor()\n            cur2.execute('SELECT data FROM part WHERE message_id = ? ORDER BY rowid', (row['id'],))\n            parts = [json.loads(p[0]) for p in cur2.fetchall()]\n            messages.append({'id': row['id'], 'role': role, 'data': data, 'parts': parts})\n        conn.close()\n        return messages\n    except Exception as e:\n        return []\n\ndef render_chat_html(messages):\n    if not messages:\n        return '<p style=\"color:#7B88A0\">No messages found in database for this session.</p>'\n    html_parts = []\n    for msg in messages:\n        role = msg['role']\n        parts = msg['parts']\n        msg_data = msg['data']\n        if role == 'user':\n            text = '\\n'.join(p.get('text', '') for p in parts if p.get('type') == 'text')\n            html_parts.append(f'''\n                <div class=\"chat-msg chat-user\">\n                    <div class=\"chat-avatar\">U</div>\n                    <div class=\"chat-bubble\">\n                        <div class=\"chat-role\">User</div>\n                        <div class=\"chat-text\">{html.escape(text)}</div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>''')\n        elif role == 'assistant':\n            finish = msg_data.get('finish', '')\n            model_id = msg_data.get('modelID', '') or msg_data.get('model', '')\n            agent = msg_data.get('agent', '')\n            tool_calls_html = \"\"\n            text_response = \"\"\n            reasoning_text = \"\"\n            for p in parts:\n                t = p.get('type', '')\n                if t == 'text':\n                    text_response = p.get('text', '')\n                elif t == 'reasoning':\n                    reasoning_text = p.get('text', '')\n                elif t == 'tool':\n                    tool_name = p.get('tool', '?')\n                    state = p.get('state', {})\n                    status = state.get('status', '')\n                    inp = state.get('input', {})\n                    outp = state.get('output', '')\n                    meta = state.get('metadata', {})\n                    title = state.get('title', '')\n                    tool_id = f\"tool_{msg['id']}_{tool_name}_{hash(json.dumps(inp)) & 0xFFFFFF}\"\n                    inp_str = json.dumps(inp, indent=2) if isinstance(inp, dict) else str(inp)\n                    outp_str = str(outp) if outp else ''\n                    if len(outp_str) > 500:\n                        outp_str = outp_str[:500] + f'\\n... [truncated, total {len(str(outp))} chars]'\n                    exit_code = meta.get('exit', '')\n                    truncated = meta.get('truncated', False)\n                    meta_info = \"\"\n                    if exit_code != '':\n                        meta_info += f' exit={exit_code}'\n                    if truncated:\n                        meta_info += ' truncated'\n                    tool_calls_html += f'''\n                        <div class=\"tool-call\">\n                            <div class=\"tool-header\" onclick=\"toggleTool('{tool_id}')\">\n                                <span class=\"tool-name\">{html.escape(tool_name)}</span>\n                                <span class=\"tool-status\">{html.escape(status)}</span>\n                                <span class=\"tool-title\">{html.escape(title)}</span>\n                                <span class=\"tool-toggle\">&#9654;</span>\n                            </div>\n                            <div class=\"tool-body\" id=\"{tool_id}\" style=\"display:none\">\n                                <div class=\"tool-section\"><div class=\"tool-section-title\">Input</div><pre>{html.escape(inp_str)}</pre></div>\n                                <div class=\"tool-section\"><div class=\"tool-section-title\">Output{meta_info}</div><pre>{html.escape(outp_str)}</pre></div>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>'''\n                elif t == 'file':\n                    filename = p.get('filename', 'file')\n                    mime = p.get('mime', '')\n                    tool_calls_html += f'''\n                        <div class=\"tool-call\">\n                            <div class=\"tool-header\">\n                                <span class=\"tool-name\">file</span>\n                                <span class=\"tool-title\">{html.escape(filename)}</span>\n                                <span class=\"tool-status\">{html.escape(mime)}</span>\n                            </div>\n                        </div>'''\n            header_parts = []\n            if model_id:\n                header_parts.append(html.escape(model_id))\n            if agent:\n                header_parts.append(f\"agent={html.escape(agent)}\")\n            if finish:\n                header_parts.append(f\"finish={html.escape(finish)}\")\n            header_str = \" | \".join(header_parts)\n            reasoning_html = \"\"\n            if reasoning_text:\n                rid = f\"reason_{msg['id']}\"\n                reasoning_html = f'''\n                    <div class=\"reasoning\" onclick=\"toggleTool('{rid}')\">\n                        <span class=\"reasoning-toggle\">&#9654;</span> Reasoning\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"reasoning-body\" id=\"{rid}\" style=\"display:none\"><pre>{html.escape(reasoning_text)}</pre></div>'''\n            text_html = f'<div class=\"chat-text\">{html.escape(text_response)}</div>' if text_response else ''\n            html_parts.append(f'''\n                <div class=\"chat-msg chat-assistant\">\n                    <div class=\"chat-avatar\">A</div>\n                    <div class=\"chat-bubble\">\n                        <div class=\"chat-role\">Assistant</div>\n                        <div class=\"chat-meta\">{header_str}</div>\n                        {reasoning_html}{text_html}{tool_calls_html}\n                    </div>\n                </div>''')\n    return '\\n'.join(html_parts) if html_parts else '<p style=\"color:#7B88A0\">No user or assistant messages found.</p>'\n\ndef gen_session_page(session, index):\n    title = f\"Session {index}: {session_label(session)}\"\n    sid = html.escape(session['id'])\n    provider = html.escape(session['provider'] or 'Unknown')\n    model = html.escape(session['model'] or 'Unknown')\n    msg_count = session['messages']\n    tools_list = sorted(session['tools'])\n    tool_calls = session['tool_calls']\n    llm_calls = session['llm_calls']\n    tools_html = \"\\n\".join(f'                    <div class=\"tool-badge\"><span class=\"tool-name\">{html.escape(t)}</span></div>' for t in tools_list)\n    messages = get_messages_for_session(session['id'])\n    chat_html = render_chat_html(messages)\n    log_html = \"\\n\".join(f'                    <div class=\"log-line\">{html.escape(e)}</div>' for e in session['log_sample'][-30:])\n    return f'''<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head><meta charset=\"UTF-8\"><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>Session {index} - {session_label(session)}</title>\n<style>{CSS}</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n<div class=\"container\">\n<div class=\"header\"><div class=\"logo\">{LOGO}</div><h1>{title}</h1><p>Session ID: {sid}</p></div>\n<div class=\"info-grid\">\n<div class=\"info-card\"><h3>Provider</h3><p>{provider}</p></div>\n<div class=\"info-card\"><h3>Model</h3><p>{model}</p></div>\n<div class=\"info-card\"><h3>Messages</h3><p>{msg_count}</p></div>\n<div class=\"info-card\"><h3>Unique Tools</h3><p>{len(tools_list)}</p></div>\n<div class=\"info-card\"><h3>Tool Calls</h3><p>{tool_calls}</p></div>\n<div class=\"info-card\"><h3>LLM Calls</h3><p>{llm_calls}</p></div>\n</div>\n<div class=\"section\"><h2>Tools Used ({len(tools_list)})</h2><div class=\"tools-grid\">{tools_html}</div></div>\n<div class=\"section\"><h2>Conversation</h2><div class=\"chat\">{chat_html}</div></div>\n<div class=\"section\"><h2>Session Timeline (last {min(30,len(session['log_sample']))} events)</h2><div class=\"log\">{log_html}</div></div>\n<a href=\"index.html\" class=\"back\">&larr; Back to Dashboard</a>\n</div>\n<script>\nfunction toggleTool(id) {{var el=document.getElementById(id);if(el){{var h=el.style.display==='none';el.style.display=h?'block':'none';var t=el.previousElementSibling;if(t){{var tg=t.querySelector('.tool-toggle,.reasoning-toggle');if(tg)tg.innerHTML=h?'&#9660;':'&#9654;';}}}}}}\n</script>\n</body>\n</html>'''\n\ndef gen_index(stats, sessions):\n    prov_html = \"\\n\".join(f'''\n                <div class=\"provider-card\"><div class=\"provider-name\">{html.escape(p)}</div><div class=\"provider-count\">{c} sessions</div></div>''' for p,c in stats['providers'].most_common())\n    tools_html = \"\\n\".join(f'''\n                <div class=\"tool-badge\"><span class=\"tool-name\">{html.escape(t)}</span> <span class=\"tool-count\">({c})</span></div>''' for t,c in stats['tools_used'].most_common(20))\n    models_html = \"\\n\".join(f'''\n                <div class=\"model-badge\">{html.escape(m)} <span class=\"count\">({c})</span></div>''' for m,c in stats['models'].most_common())\n    sessions_html = \"\"\n    for i, s in enumerate(sessions):\n        sessions_html += f'''\n            <div class=\"session-item\">\n                <div class=\"session-info\">\n                    <div class=\"session-id\">Session {i+1}: {session_label(s)}</div>\n                    <div class=\"session-meta\">{html.escape(s['provider'] or 'Unknown')} | {html.escape(s['model'] or 'Unknown')}</div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"session-stats\">\n                    <div class=\"session-messages\">{s['messages']} msgs</div>\n                    <div class=\"session-tools\">{len(s['tools'])} tools | {s['tool_calls']} calls</div>\n                </div>\n                <a href=\"session_{i+1}.html\" class=\"view-button\">View</a>\n            </div>'''\n    return f'''<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head><meta charset=\"UTF-8\"><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>Opencode Analytics Dashboard</title>\n<style>{CSS}</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n<div class=\"container\">\n<div class=\"header\"><div class=\"logo\">{LOGO}</div><h1>Opencode Analytics Dashboard</h1><p>Comprehensive analysis of opencode session logs &middot; {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}</p></div>\n<div class=\"stats-grid\">\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_sessions']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Sessions</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_messages']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Messages</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_llm_calls']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">LLM Calls</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_tool_calls']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Tool Calls</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{len(stats['providers'])}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Providers</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{len(stats['models'])}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Models</div></div>\n</div>\n<div class=\"section\"><h2>Providers</h2><div class=\"providers-grid\">{prov_html}</div></div>\n<div class=\"section\"><h2>Models</h2><div class=\"models-grid\">{models_html}</div></div>\n<div class=\"section\"><h2>Most Used Tools (sessions)</h2><div class=\"tools-grid\">{tools_html}</div></div>\n<div class=\"sessions-list\"><h2>All Sessions ({len(sessions)})</h2>{sessions_html}</div>\n<div class=\"footer\">Generated by opencode analytics generator</div>\n</div>\n</body>\n</html>'''\n\ndef main():\n    print(\"Parsing log files...\")\n    sessions = get_all_sessions()\n    sessions.sort(key=lambda s: s['id'])\n    print(f\"Found {len(sessions)} unique sessions\")\n    stats = generate_stats(sessions)\n    print(\"Generating index page...\")\n    with open(OUTPUT_DIR / \"index.html\", 'w') as f:\n        f.write(gen_index(stats, sessions))\n    print(\"Generating session pages...\")\n    for i, s in enumerate(sessions):\n        if (i+1) % 10 == 0:\n            print(f\"  Session {i+1}/{len(sessions)}...\")\n        with open(OUTPUT_DIR / f\"session_{i+1}.html\", 'w') as f:\n            f.write(gen_session_page(s, i+1))\n    print(\"Generating JSON report...\")\n    with open(OUTPUT_DIR / \"analytics-report.json\", 'w') as f:\n        json.dump({\n            'generated_at': datetime.now().isoformat(),\n            'total_sessions': stats['total_sessions'],\n            'total_messages': stats['total_messages'],\n            'total_tool_calls': stats['total_tool_calls'],\n            'total_llm_calls': stats['total_llm_calls'],\n            'providers': dict(stats['providers']),\n            'models': dict(stats['models']),\n            'tools': dict(stats['tools_used']),\n            'sessions': [{'id':s['id'],'slug':s['slug'],'provider':s['provider'],\n                          'model':s['model'],'messages':s['messages'],\n                          'tools':sorted(s['tools']),'tool_calls':s['tool_calls'],\n                          'llm_calls':s['llm_calls']} for s in sessions]\n        }, f, indent=2, default=str)\n    print(f\"\\nDone! {len(sessions)} session pages.\")\n    print(f\"Stats: {stats['total_sessions']} sessions, {stats['total_messages']} messages, \"\n          f\"{stats['total_tool_calls']} tool calls, {stats['total_llm_calls']} LLM calls\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n",
  "filePath": "/tmp/opencode_analytics_v6.py"
}

The user wants a complete redesign, not just colors but a full coherent design. Let me think about what would be really cool and fitting for an opencode session log analytics site.

The opencode CLI/TUI has a distinct terminal-based aesthetic. Let me think about what would look great:

1. **Terminal-inspired layout** - think of it like a terminal multiplexer (tmux) with panes/sections
2. **Monospace font** as primary for a terminal feel
3. **Glowing accents** - subtle glow effects on borders
4. **Terminal window chrome** - sections that look like terminal windows with title bars
5. **Status bar** at the bottom like a terminal
6. **Session list as a file explorer** - tree/list style
7. **Stats as gauges/progress bars** - more visual
8. **Border effects** - double borders like old terminal UI or subtle glow

Let me look at what opencode's actual CLI/TUI looks like for inspiration. The screenshot from the docs showed a terminal UI with:
- Dark background
- Messages in a chat format
- Section separators
- Clean, minimal

Let me create a really cool design:

Design concept: **"Terminal Dashboard"** - like a terminal monitoring tool (htop/btm style)

Key elements:
1. **Full dark background** - #0A0E14 (very dark, like a terminal)
2. **Terminal window sections** - each section looks like a terminal panel with a title bar
3. **Monospace primary font** - system monospace for data, sans-serif only for headers
4. **Pulse/glow effects** - subtle cyan glow on interactive elements
5. **Process-table style session list** - like `ps aux` or `htop`
6. **Bar/indicator style stats** - visual gauges
7. **ASCII borders** - use box-drawing characters or CSS borders that look terminal-like
8. **Status bar** - at the bottom with session info
9. **Chat UI** - styled like a terminal messenger
10. **Accent colors** - cyan (#00d4ff), green (#00ff88), purple (#b388ff), warm gray

writecompletedtmp/opencode_analytics_v7.py▶
Input
{
  "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport os, json, re, html, sqlite3\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom collections import Counter\n\nLOG_DIR = Path(\"/root/.local/share/opencode/log\")\nDB_PATH = Path(\"/root/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db\")\nOUTPUT_DIR = Path(\"/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site\")\nOUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)\n\n# \u2500\u2500 Terminal-inspired palette \u2500\u2500\n# bg=#0A0E14  surface=#131720  panel=#1A1F2B  border=#2A3040  border-bright=#3D4760\n# text=#C5CDD9  muted=#6A7894  cyan=#00D4FF  green=#00FF88  purple=#B388FF  orange=#FF8A50  red=#FF5575\n\nCSS = '''\n@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');\n\n* { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }\n\nbody {\n  background:#0A0E14;\n  color:#C5CDD9;\n  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;\n  min-height:100vh;\n  line-height:1.5;\n}\n\n::selection { background:#00D4FF33; color:#fff; }\n::-webkit-scrollbar { width:6px; height:6px; }\n::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background:#0A0E14; }\n::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:#2A3040; border-radius:3px; }\n::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background:#3D4760; }\n\n.container { max-width:1440px; margin:0 auto; padding:16px; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Top bar \u2500\u2500 */\n.top-bar {\n  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;\n  padding:12px 20px; margin-bottom:20px;\n  background:#131720; border:1px solid #2A3040; border-radius:10px;\n}\n.top-bar-left { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; }\n.top-bar-logo {\n  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.8em; color:#00D4FF;\n  white-space:pre; line-height:1.2;\n}\n.top-bar-title { font-size:1.1em; font-weight:600; color:#C5CDD9; }\n.top-bar-badge {\n  font-size:0.7em; background:#00D4FF; color:#0A0E14; padding:2px 10px;\n  border-radius:4px; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;\n}\n.top-bar-right { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; font-size:0.8em; color:#6A7894; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; }\n.top-bar-dot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:#00FF88; display:inline-block; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Terminal window \u2500\u2500 */\n.term {\n  background:#131720; border:1px solid #2A3040; border-radius:10px;\n  margin-bottom:18px; overflow:hidden;\n}\n.term-bar {\n  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;\n  padding:10px 16px; background:#1A1F2B; border-bottom:1px solid #2A3040;\n  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75em; color:#6A7894;\n  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px;\n}\n.term-dot { width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%; }\n.term-dot.r { background:#FF5575; }\n.term-dot.y { background:#FFB347; }\n.term-dot.g { background:#00FF88; }\n.term-title { flex:1; }\n.term-body { padding:18px; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Stats grid \u2500\u2500 */\n.stats-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr); gap:12px; }\n.stat-card {\n  background:#1A1F2B; border:1px solid #2A3040; border-radius:8px;\n  padding:16px; text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden;\n  transition:border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;\n}\n.stat-card:hover { border-color:#00D4FF; transform:translateY(-2px); }\n.stat-card::before {\n  content:''; position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;\n  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00D4FF44,transparent);\n}\n.stat-value { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:2em; font-weight:700; color:#00D4FF; }\n.stat-label { font-size:0.75em; color:#6A7894; margin-top:4px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Grid content layout \u2500\u2500 */\n.content-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 320px; gap:18px; }\n.content-main { min-width:0; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Providers, Models, Tools \u2500\u2500 */\n.badge-grid { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; }\n.badge {\n  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;\n  padding:6px 12px; background:#1A1F2B; border:1px solid #2A3040;\n  border-radius:6px; font-size:0.82em;\n}\n.badge .name { color:#C5CDD9; }\n.badge .count { color:#6A7894; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.85em; }\n.badge.provider-0 { border-color:#00D4FF44; }\n.badge.provider-1 { border-color:#B388FF44; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Models section \u2500\u2500 */\n.model-row {\n  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:8px 0;\n  border-bottom:1px solid #1A1F2B;\n}\n.model-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }\n.model-name { flex:1; font-size:0.9em; }\n.model-count { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.8em; color:#00D4FF; min-width:30px; text-align:right; }\n.model-bar { width:100px; height:6px; background:#1A1F2B; border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; }\n.model-bar-fill { height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00D4FF,#00FF88); border-radius:3px; transition:width 0.6s; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Session table \u2500\u2500 */\n.sessions-table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; }\n.sessions-table th {\n  text-align:left; padding:8px 12px; font-size:0.72em; color:#6A7894;\n  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; border-bottom:1px solid #2A3040;\n  font-weight:500;\n}\n.sessions-table td { padding:8px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid #1A1F2B; font-size:0.85em; }\n.sessions-table tr:hover td { background:#1A1F2B66; }\n.sessions-table .col-num { width:32px; text-align:right; color:#6A7894; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.8em; }\n.sessions-table .col-name { font-weight:500; cursor:pointer; }\n.sessions-table .col-name a { color:#C5CDD9; text-decoration:none; }\n.sessions-table .col-name a:hover { color:#00D4FF; }\n.sessions-table .col-provider { color:#6A7894; font-size:0.8em; }\n.sessions-table .col-model { color:#6A7894; font-size:0.8em; }\n.sessions-table .col-msgs { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; color:#00FF88; font-size:0.85em; text-align:right; }\n.sessions-table .col-tools { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; color:#B388FF; font-size:0.85em; text-align:right; }\n.sessions-table .col-calls { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; color:#00D4FF; font-size:0.85em; text-align:right; }\n.sessions-table .col-view { text-align:right; }\n.sessions-table .col-view a {\n  display:inline-block; padding:4px 14px; border:1px solid #2A3040;\n  border-radius:4px; font-size:0.75em; color:#6A7894; text-decoration:none;\n  transition:all 0.2s;\n}\n.sessions-table .col-view a:hover { border-color:#00D4FF; color:#00D4FF; background:#00D4FF11; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Side panel (tools leaderboard) \u2500\u2500 */\n.side-panel { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:18px; }\n.tool-rank {\n  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:6px 0;\n  border-bottom:1px solid #1A1F2B; font-size:0.85em;\n}\n.tool-rank:last-child { border-bottom:none; }\n.tool-rank-num { color:#6A7894; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.8em; min-width:16px; }\n.tool-rank-name { flex:1; }\n.tool-rank-count { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; color:#B388FF; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Status bar \u2500\u2500 */\n.status-bar {\n  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;\n  padding:10px 16px; background:#131720; border:1px solid #2A3040;\n  border-radius:8px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.75em; color:#6A7894; margin-top:4px;\n}\n.status-left { display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:center; }\n.status-right { display:flex; gap:16px; align-items:center; }\n.status-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; }\n.status-dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; }\n.status-dot.cyan { background:#00D4FF; }\n.status-dot.green { background:#00FF88; }\n.status-dot.purple { background:#B388FF; }\n\n/* \u2500\u2500 Session page specific \u2500\u2500 */\n.session-info-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr); gap:10px; }\n.session-info-card {\n  background:#1A1F2B; border:1px solid #2A3040; border-radius:6px;\n  padding:12px; text-align:center;\n}\n.session-info-card .label { font-size:0.65em; color:#6A7894; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; }\n.session-info-card .value { font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:1.4em; font-weight:700; margin-top:4px; }\n.session-info-card .value.cyan { color:#00D4FF; }\n.session-info-card .value.green { color:#00FF88; }\n.session-info-card .value.purple { color:#B388FF; }\n.session-info-card .value.orange { color:#FF8A50; }\n\n/* Chat */\n.chat { margin-top:6px; }\n.chat-msg { display:flex; gap:10px; margin-bottom:14px; }\n.chat-avatar {\n  width:28px; height:28px; border-radius:6px; display:flex;\n  align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:700;\n  font-size:0.75em; flex-shrink:0; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;\n}\n.chat-user .chat-avatar { background:#00FF8833; color:#00FF88; border:1px solid #00FF8844; }\n.chat-assistant .chat-avatar { background:#00D4FF33; color:#00D4FF; border:1px solid #00D4FF44; }\n.chat-bubble { flex:1; background:#1A1F2B; border-radius:8px; padding:12px; border:1px solid #2A3040; }\n.chat-user .chat-bubble { border-color:#00FF8844; }\n.chat-role { font-weight:600; font-size:0.82em; color:#C5CDD9; margin-bottom:2px; }\n.chat-meta { font-size:0.72em; color:#6A7894; margin-bottom:6px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; }\n.chat-text { white-space:pre-wrap; line-height:1.7; font-size:0.9em; }\n\n/* Reasoning */\n.reasoning { cursor:pointer; color:#6A7894; font-size:0.82em; padding:4px 0; user-select:none; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; }\n.reasoning:hover { color:#B388FF; }\n.reasoning-body pre { background:#0A0E14; padding:10px; border-radius:6px; font-size:0.8em; color:#8A9BB0; white-space:pre-wrap; margin:6px 0; border:1px solid #2A3040; }\n\n/* Tool call */\n.tool-call { border:1px solid #2A3040; border-radius:6px; margin:6px 0; overflow:hidden; }\n.tool-header {\n  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:6px 10px;\n  background:#0A0E14; cursor:pointer; user-select:none; font-size:0.82em;\n}\n.tool-header:hover { background:#131720; }\n.tool-name { font-weight:600; color:#00D4FF; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; }\n.tool-status { color:#6A7894; font-size:0.85em; }\n.tool-title { color:#6A7894; font-size:0.85em; flex:1; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; }\n.tool-toggle { font-size:0.7em; color:#6A7894; }\n.tool-body { padding:8px; background:#131720; }\n.tool-section { margin:4px 0; }\n.tool-section-title { font-size:0.7em; color:#6A7894; font-weight:600; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.5px; margin-bottom:4px; }\n.tool-body pre { background:#0A0E14; color:#8A9BB0; padding:8px; border-radius:4px; font-size:0.78em; overflow-x:auto; white-space:pre-wrap; word-break:break-all; max-height:180px; overflow-y:auto; border:1px solid #2A3040; }\n\n/* Timeline log */\n.log { background:#0A0E14; border-radius:6px; padding:14px; max-height:380px; overflow-y:auto; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72em; line-height:1.6; border:1px solid #2A3040; }\n.log-line { padding:2px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #131720; word-break:break-all; color:#5A6880; }\n.log-line:nth-child(even) { background:#0D1117; }\n\n/* Animations */\n@keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.5} }\n@keyframes scanline {\n  0%{transform:translateY(-100%)}\n  100%{transform:translateY(100vh)}\n}\n.scanline {\n  position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;\n  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00D4FF11,transparent);\n  animation:scanline 8s linear infinite; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999;\n}\n\n/* Responsive */\n@media(max-width:900px){ .content-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .stats-grid,.session-info-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)} }\n@media(max-width:600px){ .stats-grid,.session-info-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} }\n'''\n\nLOGO = r'''   ___                         ___       ___\n  / _ \\ _ __   ___   ___     / _ \\     / _ \\\n | | | | '_ \\ / _ \\ / __|   | | | |   | | | |\n | |_| | |_) | (_) | (__    | |_| |_  | |_| |\n  \\___/| .__/ \\___/ \\___|    \\___(_)  \\___/\n       |_|'''\n\ndef parse_log(lines, is_new_format=False):\n    sessions = {}; current_sid = None\n    for line in lines:\n        line_s = line.strip()\n        if not line_s: continue\n        sid = None\n        if is_new_format:\n            m = re.search(r'session\\.id=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m: sid = m.group(1)\n        else:\n            m = re.search(r'session\\.id=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m: sid = m.group(1)\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\s+id=(ses_\\w+)', line_s)\n            if m: sid = m.group(1)\n        if sid:\n            current_sid = sid\n            if sid not in sessions:\n                sessions[sid] = {'id':sid,'provider':None,'model':None,'tools':set(),'messages':0,'llm_calls':0,'tool_calls':0,'steps':set(),'message_ids':set(),'slug':'?','title':'?','log_sample':[]}\n        if not current_sid or current_sid not in sessions: continue\n        s = sessions[current_sid]\n        if is_new_format:\n            m = re.search(r'message=stream\\s+providerID=(\\S+)\\s+modelID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m: s['provider']=m.group(1); s['model']=m.group(2); s['llm_calls']+=1\n            m = re.search(r'message=loop\\s+.*?step=(\\d+)', line_s)\n            if m: s['steps'].add(int(m.group(1)))\n            m = re.search(r'message=process\\s+.*?messageID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m: s['message_ids'].add(m.group(1))\n            if any(kw in line_s for kw in ['message=loop','message=stream','message=evaluated','message=process','shell tool']):\n                s['log_sample'].append(re.sub(r'timestamp=[^\\s]+\\s+level=\\S+\\s+run=\\S+\\s+','',line_s)[:300])\n        else:\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\s+id='+re.escape(current_sid)+r'\\s+slug=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m:\n                s['slug']=m.group(1)\n                tm2=re.search(r'\"id\":\"([^\"]+)\"',line_s)\n                if tm2: s['model']=tm2.group(1)\n                tm3=re.search(r'\"providerID\":\"([^\"]+)\"',line_s)\n                if tm3: s['provider']=tm3.group(1)\n            m = re.search(r'service=llm\\s+providerID=(\\S+)\\s+modelID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m: s['provider']=m.group(1); s['model']=m.group(2); s['llm_calls']+=1\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\.prompt\\s+.*?step=(\\d+)', line_s)\n            if m: s['steps'].add(int(m.group(1)))\n            m = re.search(r'service=session\\.processor\\s+.*?messageID=(\\S+)', line_s)\n            if m: s['message_ids'].add(m.group(1))\n            if any(kw in line_s for kw in ['service=llm','service=session.prompt','service=session.processor']):\n                s['log_sample'].append(re.sub(r'INFO\\s+[^\\s]+\\s+\\+?\\d*ms\\s+','',line_s)[:300])\n    for s in sessions.values():\n        if s['steps']: s['messages']=len(s['steps'])\n        elif s['message_ids']: s['messages']=len(s['message_ids'])\n        else: s['messages']=s['llm_calls']\n    return sessions\n\ndef get_db_tool_counts():\n    counts={}; tools_per_session={}\n    try:\n        conn=sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH)); cur=conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT session_id,COUNT(*) FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' GROUP BY session_id\")\n        for sid,cnt in cur.fetchall(): counts[sid]=cnt\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT session_id,json_extract(data,'$.tool') AS tn FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' AND json_extract(data,'$.tool') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id,tn\")\n        for sid,tn in cur.fetchall():\n            if sid not in tools_per_session: tools_per_session[sid]=set()\n            tools_per_session[sid].add(tn)\n        conn.close()\n    except: pass\n    return counts,tools_per_session\n\ndef get_all_sessions():\n    all_sessions={}\n    for log_file in sorted(LOG_DIR.glob(\"*.log\")):\n        print(f\"  Processing {log_file.name}...\")\n        with open(log_file) as f: lines=f.readlines()\n        parsed=parse_log(lines,log_file.name==\"opencode.log\")\n        for sid,s in parsed.items():\n            if sid not in all_sessions:\n                all_sessions[sid]=s\n            else:\n                e=all_sessions[sid]\n                if s['slug'] and s['slug']!='?': e['slug']=s['slug']\n                if s['provider'] and (not e['provider'] or s['llm_calls']>e['llm_calls']): e['provider']=s['provider']\n                if s['model'] and (not e['model'] or s['llm_calls']>e['llm_calls']): e['model']=s['model']\n                e['llm_calls']+=s['llm_calls']; e['steps']|=s['steps']; e['message_ids']|=s['message_ids']\n                e['log_sample']=(e['log_sample']+s['log_sample'])[:50]\n                if e['steps']: e['messages']=len(e['steps'])\n                elif e['message_ids']: e['messages']=len(e['message_ids'])\n                else: e['messages']=e['llm_calls']\n    print(\"  Querying DB for tool counts...\")\n    db_counts,db_tools=get_db_tool_counts()\n    for s in all_sessions.values():\n        s['tool_calls']=db_counts.get(s['id'],0)\n        if s['id'] in db_tools: s['tools']=db_tools[s['id']]\n    return list(all_sessions.values())\n\ndef generate_stats(sessions):\n    providers=Counter(); models=Counter(); tools_used=Counter(); tm=0; tt=0; tl=0\n    for s in sessions:\n        providers[s['provider'] or 'Unknown']+=1\n        models[s['model'] or 'Unknown']+=1\n        for t in s['tools']: tools_used[t]+=1\n        tm+=s['messages']; tt+=s['tool_calls']; tl+=s['llm_calls']\n    return {'total_sessions':len(sessions),'total_messages':tm,'total_tool_calls':tt,'total_llm_calls':tl,'providers':providers,'models':models,'tools_used':tools_used}\n\ndef session_label(s):\n    return html.escape(s['slug'] if s['slug'] and s['slug']!='?' else s['id'][:25])\n\ndef get_messages_for_session(sid):\n    try:\n        conn=sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH)); conn.row_factory=sqlite3.Row; cur=conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute('SELECT id,data,time_created FROM message WHERE session_id=? ORDER BY time_created',(sid,))\n        msgs=[]\n        for row in cur.fetchall():\n            data=json.loads(row['data']); cur2=conn.cursor()\n            cur2.execute('SELECT data FROM part WHERE message_id=? ORDER BY rowid',(row['id'],))\n            parts=[json.loads(p[0]) for p in cur2.fetchall()]\n            msgs.append({'id':row['id'],'role':data.get('role','unknown'),'data':data,'parts':parts})\n        conn.close(); return msgs\n    except: return []\n\ndef render_chat_html(messages):\n    if not messages: return '<p style=\"color:#6A7894\">No messages found.</p>'\n    parts=[]\n    for msg in messages:\n        if msg['role']=='user':\n            text='\\n'.join(p.get('text','') for p in msg['parts'] if p.get('type')=='text')\n            parts.append(f'''<div class=\"chat-msg chat-user\"><div class=\"chat-avatar\">U</div><div class=\"chat-bubble\"><div class=\"chat-role\">User</div><div class=\"chat-text\">{html.escape(text)}</div></div></div>''')\n        elif msg['role']=='assistant':\n            finish=msg['data'].get('finish',''); model_id=msg['data'].get('modelID','') or msg['data'].get('model',''); agent=msg['data'].get('agent','')\n            tch=\"\"; tr=\"\"; rr=\"\"\n            for p in msg['parts']:\n                t=p.get('type','')\n                if t=='text': tr=p.get('text','')\n                elif t=='reasoning': rr=p.get('text','')\n                elif t=='tool':\n                    nm=p.get('tool','?'); st=p.get('state',{}); status=st.get('status','')\n                    inp=st.get('input',{}); outp=st.get('output',''); meta=st.get('metadata',{}); title=st.get('title','')\n                    tid=f\"t_{msg['id']}_{nm}_{hash(json.dumps(inp))&0xFFFFFF}\"\n                    inp_str=json.dumps(inp,indent=2) if isinstance(inp,dict) else str(inp)\n                    outp_str=str(outp)[:500]+('...' if len(str(outp))>500 else '')\n                    meta_info=''.join(f' exit={meta.get(\"exit\",\"\")}' if meta.get(\"exit\")!='' else '' for _ in[0])+(' truncated' if meta.get('truncated') else '')\n                    tch+=f'''<div class=\"tool-call\"><div class=\"tool-header\" onclick=\"tt('{tid}')\"><span class=\"tool-name\">{html.escape(nm)}</span><span class=\"tool-status\">{html.escape(status)}</span><span class=\"tool-title\">{html.escape(title)}</span><span class=\"tool-toggle\">&#9654;</span></div><div class=\"tool-body\" id=\"{tid}\"><div class=\"tool-section\"><div class=\"tool-section-title\">Input</div><pre>{html.escape(inp_str)}</pre></div><div class=\"tool-section\"><div class=\"tool-section-title\">Output{meta_info}</div><pre>{html.escape(outp_str)}</pre></div></div></div>'''\n                elif t=='file':\n                    tch+=f'''<div class=\"tool-call\"><div class=\"tool-header\"><span class=\"tool-name\">file</span><span class=\"tool-title\">{html.escape(p.get(\"filename\",\"?\"))}</span></div></div>'''\n            hp=[x for x in([html.escape(model_id)]if model_id else[])+([f\"agent={html.escape(agent)}\"]if agent else[])+([f\"finish={html.escape(finish)}\"]if finish else[])]\n            hs=' | '.join(hp)\n            rh=f'''<div class=\"reasoning\" onclick=\"tt('r_{msg['id']}')\">&#9654; Reasoning</div><div class=\"reasoning-body\" id=\"r_{msg['id']}\"><pre>{html.escape(rr)}</pre></div>''' if rr else ''\n            th=f'<div class=\"chat-text\">{html.escape(tr)}</div>' if tr else ''\n            parts.append(f'''<div class=\"chat-msg chat-assistant\"><div class=\"chat-avatar\">A</div><div class=\"chat-bubble\"><div class=\"chat-role\">Assistant</div><div class=\"chat-meta\">{hs}</div>{rh}{th}{tch}</div></div>''')\n    return '\\n'.join(parts) if parts else '<p style=\"color:#6A7894\">No messages.</p>'\n\ndef gen_session_page(session, index):\n    label=session_label(session)\n    sid=html.escape(session['id']); prov=html.escape(session['provider'] or 'Unknown')\n    model=html.escape(session['model'] or 'Unknown'); mc=session['messages']\n    tools_list=sorted(session['tools']); tc=session['tool_calls']; lc=session['llm_calls']\n    messages=get_messages_for_session(session['id']); chat=render_chat_html(messages)\n    log=\"\\n\".join(f'<div class=\"log-line\">{html.escape(e)}</div>' for e in session['log_sample'][-30:])\n    th=\"\\n\".join(f'<span class=\"badge\"><span class=\"name\">{html.escape(t)}</span></span>' for t in tools_list)\n\n    return f'''<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head><meta charset=\"UTF-8\"><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0\"><title>Session {index} \u2014 {label}</title><style>{CSS}</style></head>\n<body><div class=\"scanline\"></div>\n<div class=\"container\">\n\n<div class=\"top-bar\">\n<div class=\"top-bar-left\"><div class=\"top-bar-logo\">{LOGO}</div><span class=\"top-bar-title\">Session Logs</span><span class=\"top-bar-badge\">Session #{index}</span></div>\n<div class=\"top-bar-right\"><span class=\"top-bar-dot\"></span> live &middot; {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}</div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">info \u2014 {label}</span><span>{sid[:20]}\u2026</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\">\n<div class=\"session-info-grid\">\n<div class=\"session-info-card\"><div class=\"label\">Provider</div><div class=\"value cyan\">{prov}</div></div>\n<div class=\"session-info-card\"><div class=\"label\">Model</div><div class=\"value cyan\">{model}</div></div>\n<div class=\"session-info-card\"><div class=\"label\">Messages</div><div class=\"value green\">{mc}</div></div>\n<div class=\"session-info-card\"><div class=\"label\">Tools</div><div class=\"value purple\">{len(tools_list)}</div></div>\n<div class=\"session-info-card\"><div class=\"label\">Tool Calls</div><div class=\"value orange\">{tc}</div></div>\n<div class=\"session-info-card\"><div class=\"label\">LLM Calls</div><div class=\"value cyan\">{lc}</div></div>\n</div>\n</div></div>\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">tools</span><span>{len(tools_list)} unique</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\"><div class=\"badge-grid\">{th}</div></div></div>\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">conversation</span><span>{mc} messages</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\"><div class=\"chat\">{chat}</div></div></div>\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">timeline</span><span>{min(30,len(session['log_sample']))} events</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\"><div class=\"log\">{log}</div></div></div>\n\n<a href=\"index.html\" style=\"display:inline-block;padding:8px 18px;border:1px solid #2A3040;border-radius:6px;color:#6A7894;text-decoration:none;font-size:0.85em;transition:all 0.2s;\" onmouseover=\"this.style.borderColor='#00D4FF';this.style.color='#00D4FF'\" onmouseout=\"this.style.borderColor='#2A3040';this.style.color='#6A7894'\">&larr; Back to overview</a>\n\n<div class=\"status-bar\">\n<div class=\"status-left\"><span class=\"status-item\"><span class=\"status-dot cyan\"></span> {prov}</span><span class=\"status-item\"><span class=\"status-dot green\"></span> {model}</span></div>\n<div class=\"status-right\"><span class=\"status-item\">{tc} tool calls</span><span class=\"status-item\">{lc} llm calls</span><span class=\"status-item\">{mc} messages</span></div>\n</div></div>\n<script>function tt(id){{var e=document.getElementById(id);if(e){{var h=e.style.display==='none';e.style.display=h?'block':'none';var p=e.previousElementSibling;if(p){{var tg=p.querySelector('.tool-toggle');if(tg)tg.innerHTML=h?'&#9660;':'&#9654;';}}}}}}</script>\n</body></html>'''\n\ndef gen_index(stats, sessions):\n    models_total=sum(stats['models'].values())\n    model_rows=\"\\n\".join(\n        f'<div class=\"model-row\"><span class=\"model-name\">{html.escape(m)}</span><div class=\"model-bar\"><div class=\"model-bar-fill\" style=\"width:{c/models_total*100:.1f}%\"></div></div><span class=\"model-count\">{c}</span></div>'\n        for m,c in stats['models'].most_common())\n\n    # Tool list for side panel\n    tool_items=\"\"\n    for i,(t,c) in enumerate(stats['tools_used'].most_common(15)):\n        tool_items+=f'<div class=\"tool-rank\"><span class=\"tool-rank-num\">#{i+1}</span><span class=\"tool-rank-name\">{html.escape(t)}</span><span class=\"tool-rank-count\">{c}</span></div>'\n\n    prov_items=\"\"\n    color_idx=0\n    for p,c in stats['providers'].most_common():\n        prov_items+=f'<span class=\"badge provider-{color_idx%2}\"><span class=\"name\">{html.escape(p)}</span><span class=\"count\">{c}</span></span>'\n        color_idx+=1\n\n    sessions_rows=\"\"\n    for i,s in enumerate(sessions):\n        label=session_label(s)\n        sessions_rows+=f'''<tr><td class=\"col-num\">{i+1}</td><td class=\"col-name\"><a href=\"session_{i+1}.html\">{label}</a></td><td class=\"col-provider\">{html.escape(s['provider'] or '?')}</td><td class=\"col-model\">{html.escape(s['model'] or '?')}</td><td class=\"col-msgs\">{s['messages']}</td><td class=\"col-tools\">{len(s['tools'])}</td><td class=\"col-calls\">{s['tool_calls']}</td><td class=\"col-view\"><a href=\"session_{i+1}.html\">open</a></td></tr>'''\n\n    return f'''<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head><meta charset=\"UTF-8\"><meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0\"><title>Session Logs</title><style>{CSS}</style></head>\n<body><div class=\"scanline\"></div>\n<div class=\"container\">\n\n<div class=\"top-bar\">\n<div class=\"top-bar-left\"><div class=\"top-bar-logo\">{LOGO}</div><span class=\"top-bar-title\">Session Logs</span><span class=\"top-bar-badge\">v1.0</span></div>\n<div class=\"top-bar-right\"><span class=\"top-bar-dot\"></span> live &middot; {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}</div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"stats-grid\">\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_sessions']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Sessions</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_messages']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Messages</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_llm_calls']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">LLM Calls</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{stats['total_tool_calls']}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Tool Calls</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{len(stats['providers'])}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Providers</div></div>\n<div class=\"stat-card\"><div class=\"stat-value\">{len(stats['models'])}</div><div class=\"stat-label\">Models</div></div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"content-grid\">\n<div class=\"content-main\">\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">sessions</span><span>{len(sessions)} total</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\" style=\"padding:0\">\n<table class=\"sessions-table\">\n<thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Name</th><th>Provider</th><th>Model</th><th>Msgs</th><th>Tools</th><th>Calls</th><th></th></tr></thead>\n<tbody>{sessions_rows}</tbody>\n</table>\n</div></div>\n\n</div>\n<div class=\"side-panel\">\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">providers</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\"><div class=\"badge-grid\">{prov_items}</div></div></div>\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">models</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\">{model_rows}</div></div>\n\n<div class=\"term\">\n<div class=\"term-bar\"><span class=\"term-dot r\"></span><span class=\"term-dot y\"></span><span class=\"term-dot g\"></span><span class=\"term-title\">tools leaderboard</span></div>\n<div class=\"term-body\">{tool_items}</div></div>\n\n</div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"status-bar\">\n<div class=\"status-left\"><span class=\"status-item\"><span class=\"status-dot cyan\"></span> {len(sessions)} sessions</span><span class=\"status-item\"><span class=\"status-dot green\"></span> {stats['total_messages']} messages</span><span class=\"status-item\"><span class=\"status-dot purple\"></span> {stats['total_tool_calls']} tool calls</span></div>\n<div class=\"status-right\"><span class=\"status-item\">opencode analytics</span><span class=\"status-item\">generated {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M')}</span></div>\n</div>\n</div>\n</body></html>'''\n\ndef main():\n    print(\"Parsing log files...\")\n    sessions=get_all_sessions()\n    sessions.sort(key=lambda s: s['id'])\n    print(f\"Found {len(sessions)} sessions\"); stats=generate_stats(sessions)\n    print(\"Generating index...\")\n    with open(OUTPUT_DIR/\"index.html\",'w') as f: f.write(gen_index(stats,sessions))\n    print(\"Generating session pages...\")\n    for i,s in enumerate(sessions):\n        if (i+1)%10==0: print(f\"  {i+1}/{len(sessions)}...\")\n        with open(OUTPUT_DIR/f\"session_{i+1}.html\",'w') as f: f.write(gen_session_page(s,i+1))\n    print(\"Generating JSON...\")\n    with open(OUTPUT_DIR/\"analytics-report.json\",'w') as f:\n        json.dump({'generated_at':datetime.now().isoformat(),'total_sessions':stats['total_sessions'],'total_messages':stats['total_messages'],'total_tool_calls':stats['total_tool_calls'],'total_llm_calls':stats['total_llm_calls'],'providers':dict(stats['providers']),'models':dict(stats['models']),'tools':dict(stats['tools_used']),'sessions':[{'id':s['id'],'slug':s['slug'],'provider':s['provider'],'model':s['model'],'messages':s['messages'],'tools':sorted(s['tools']),'tool_calls':s['tool_calls'],'llm_calls':s['llm_calls']} for s in sessions]},f,indent=2,default=str)\n    print(f\"\\nDone! {len(sessions)} sessions, {stats['total_messages']} messages, {stats['total_tool_calls']} tool calls, {stats['total_llm_calls']} LLM calls\")\n\nif __name__==\"__main__\":\n    main()\n",

  "description": "Get tool and model occurrence counts from DB"
}

Input
{
  "filePath": "/tmp/opencode_analytics_v7.py",
  "newString": "def get_db_tool_counts():\n    counts={}; tools_per_session={}\n    try:\n        conn=sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH)); cur=conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT session_id,COUNT(*) FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' GROUP BY session_id\")\n        for sid,cnt in cur.fetchall(): counts[sid]=cnt\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT session_id,json_extract(data,'$.tool') AS tn FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' AND json_extract(data,'$.tool') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id,tn\")\n        for sid,tn in cur.fetchall():\n            if sid not in tools_per_session: tools_per_session[sid]=set()\n            tools_per_session[sid].add(tn)\n        conn.close()\n    except: pass\n    return counts,tools_per_session\n\ndef get_db_occurrence_counts():\n    \"\"\"Get total occurrence counts for tools, models, providers across ALL messages.\"\"\"\n    tools={}; models={}; providers={}\n    try:\n        conn=sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH)); cur=conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT json_extract(data,'$.tool'),COUNT(*) FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' AND json_extract(data,'$.tool') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1\")\n        for t,c in cur.fetchall(): tools[t]=c\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT json_extract(data,'$.modelID'),COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE json_extract(data,'$.role')='assistant' AND json_extract(data,'$.modelID') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1\")\n        for m,c in cur.fetchall(): models[m]=c\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT json_extract(data,'$.providerID'),COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE json_extract(data,'$.role')='assistant' AND json_extract(data,'$.providerID') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1\")\n        for p,c in cur.fetchall(): providers[p]=c\n        conn.close()\n    except: pass\n    return tools,models,providers",
  "oldString": "def get_db_tool_counts():\n    counts={}; tools_per_session={}\n    try:\n        conn=sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH)); cur=conn.cursor()\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT session_id,COUNT(*) FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' GROUP BY session_id\")\n        for sid,cnt in cur.fetchall(): counts[sid]=cnt\n        cur.execute(\"SELECT session_id,json_extract(data,'$.tool') AS tn FROM part WHERE json_extract(data,'$.type')='tool' AND json_extract(data,'$.tool') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY session_id,tn\")\n        for sid,tn in cur.fetchall():\n            if sid not in tools_per_session: tools_per_session[sid]=set()\n            tools_per_session[sid].add(tn)\n        conn.close()\n    except: pass\n    return counts,tools_per_session"
}

{
  "filePath": "/tmp/opencode_analytics_v7.py",
  "newString": "def generate_stats(sessions,tool_occ,model_occ,prov_occ):\n    providers=Counter(); models=Counter(); tools_used=Counter(); tm=0; tt=0; tl=0\n    for s in sessions:\n        providers[s['provider'] or 'Unknown']+=1\n        tm+=s['messages']; tt+=s['tool_calls']; tl+=s['llm_calls']\n    # Use DB occurrence counts for tools, models, providers\n    for t,c in tool_occ.items(): tools_used[t]=c\n    for m,c in model_occ.items(): models[m]=c\n    for p,c in prov_occ.items():\n        if p not in providers: providers[p]=c\n    return {'total_sessions':len(sessions),'total_messages':tm,'total_tool_calls':tt,'total_llm_calls':tl,'providers':providers,'models':models,'tools_used':tools_used}",
  "oldString": "def generate_stats(sessions):\n    providers=Counter(); models=Counter(); tools_used=Counter(); tm=0; tt=0; tl=0\n    for s in sessions:\n        providers[s['provider'] or 'Unknown']+=1\n        models[s['model'] or 'Unknown']+=1\n        for t in s['tools']: tools_used[t]+=1\n        tm+=s['messages']; tt+=s['tool_calls']; tl+=s['llm_calls']\n    return {'total_sessions':len(sessions),'total_messages':tm,'total_tool_calls':tt,'total_llm_calls':tl,'providers':providers,'models':models,'tools_used':tools_used}"
}

▶ Reasoning
The user wants me to update the anchored summary based on the conversation history. Let me review what's happened since the previous summary and extract the key changes.

Key changes from the conversation:
1. The site was moved from `/tmp/opencode-analytics` to `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site`
2. The parser was completely rewritten multiple times to fix bugs
3. The tool call statistics were fixed to use DB data instead of log permission evaluations
4. The design was completely overhauled to an opencode-inspired terminal theme
5. Session pages now show full chat conversations from the database
6. The site now has 73 sessions, 1458 messages, ~5000 tool calls, ~4000 LLM calls
7. The generator script evolved from v1 to v7
8. Caddy was configured to point to `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site`
9. The title was changed to "Session Logs"

Let me update the summary accordingly.
## Goal
- Create and host a comprehensive analytics website for opencode session logs at analytics.gulasch.site with accurate stats, chat conversations, and a polished terminal-inspired design

## Constraints & Preferences
- Server will be shut down afterwards, so the website must preserve all data
- Design should be inspired by opencode web UI / CLI (Nord dark theme, terminal aesthetic)
- Tool call statistics must come from the database (actual executions), not log permission evaluations
- Individual session pages must display full AI chat with messages, reasoning, and tool calls

## Progress
### Done
- Rewrote generator script 7 times, evolving from broken parser to full-featured analytics engine
- Parser now correctly handles both old `INFO ...` log format and new `timestamp=...` format
- Sessions grouped by unique session ID (73 real sessions, down from 12,104 fake ones)
- Tool call counts sourced from DB `part` table (`type='tool'`) instead of inflated permission evaluations — 5,001 actual calls (was 8,208)
- Unique tool types per session also sourced from DB (adds `apply_patch`, `write`, `question`, `invalid` missed by log parsing)
- Session pages now display full chat conversations from opencode SQLite database
- Chat UI shows user messages (green), assistant messages (cyan), collapsible reasoning, collapsible tool calls with input/output panels
- Slug names now correctly extracted from `service=session id=ses_xxx slug=yyy` lines (fixed regex bug)
- Complete redesign with terminal-inspired theme: dark bg `#0A0E14`, window chrome with traffic-light dots, JetBrains Mono font, scanline animation, status bar, model progress bars, tools leaderboard side panel
- Site moved from `/tmp/opencode-analytics` to `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site`
- Caddy configured for new path — HTTPS returns 200
- Title changed to "Session Logs"

### In Progress
- (none)

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Use Database as truth source for tool call counts instead of log permission evaluations (DB has 5K actual tool parts vs 8K permission evaluations from logs)
- Terminal window chrome design (traffic-light dots, title bars, monospace) for coherent opencode-inspired aesthetic
- Query DB per-session during page generation for chat content rather than pre-loading everything
- Fall back to truncated session ID when slug is unavailable (new log format sessions have no slug)

## Next Steps
- (none — site is complete and serving)

## Critical Context
- Generator script: `/tmp/opencode_analytics_v7.py` (latest, with DB chat + terminal theme)
- Output dir: `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site/`
- DB source: `/root/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db` (97MB SQLite)
- Log source: `/root/.local/share/opencode/log/` (12 log files, ~57MB)
- Final stats: 73 sessions, 1,458 messages, 5,001 tool calls, 4,058 LLM calls, 3 providers, 5 models

## Relevant Files
- `/tmp/opencode_analytics_v7.py`: the current generator script (terminal theme, DB chat, DB tool counts)
- `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site/index.html`: main dashboard (Session Logs)
- `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site/session_{1..73}.html`: individual session pages with full chat
- `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site/analytics-report.json`: full data dump
- `/etc/caddy/Caddyfile`: contains `analytics.gulasch.site` block pointing to `/var/www/analytics.gulasch.site`
- `/root/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db`: source database for message content and tool parts
- `/root/.local/share/opencode/log/*.log`: source session logs

Excellent! The `session` table has tons of useful data:
- `cost` - total cost per session
- `tokens_input` - input tokens
- `tokens_output` - output tokens
- `tokens_reasoning` - reasoning tokens
- `tokens_cache_read`, `tokens_cache_write` - cache tokens
- `time_created`, `time_updated` - timestamps
- `model` - model used
- `agent` - agent type
- `summary_additions`, `summary_deletions`, `summary_files` - file change stats

This opens up a lot of analytics possibilities:

1. **Cost tracking** - total cost per session, cost per model
2. **Token usage** - input/output/reasoning token distribution  
3. **Time-series charts** - sessions over time, messages over time
4. **Session duration** - how long sessions last
5. **Cost distribution** - histogram of session costs
6. **Token efficiency** - tokens per message
7. **Model comparison** - cost per model, tokens per model
8. **Agent comparison** - which agents are used
9. **File changes** - additions/deletions per session
10. **Activity heatmap** - sessions by hour/day

Let me query for some of this data and figure out what charts would be most interesting.

Let me also look at what typical LLM monitoring dashboards show (like LangFuse, Weights & Biases, etc.) and what typical dev tool dashboards show.

Key chart ideas:
1. **Sessions over time** (bar/line chart) - sessions per day
2. **Cost per session** (bar chart) - sorted by cost, top sessions
3. **Token distribution** (stacked bar) - input vs output vs reasoning per session
4. **Tool usage pie/bar** - already have this but as counts
5. **Model cost comparison** - bar chart
6. **Session duration** - how long each session ran
7. **Activity heatmap** - sessions by hour/day of week
8. **Message count vs cost** - scatter plot
9. **Cumulative cost over time** - line chart showing total spend growth
10. **Top directories/projects** - where sessions happened

bashcompletedExplore cost, token, duration data▶
Input
{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3\nconn = sqlite3.connect('/root/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db')\ncur = conn.cursor()\n\n# Cost data\ncur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*),ROUND(SUM(cost),2),ROUND(AVG(cost),4),ROUND(MAX(cost),2) FROM session WHERE cost>0')\nprint('Cost stats (sessions with cost>0):', cur.fetchone())\ncur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM session WHERE cost=0')\nprint('Sessions with cost=0:', cur.fetchone()[0])\ncur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM session')\nprint('Total sessions in DB:', cur.fetchone()[0])\n\n# Token stats\ncur.execute('SELECT SUM(tokens_input),SUM(tokens_output),SUM(tokens_reasoning),SUM(tokens_cache_read),SUM(tokens_cache_write) FROM session')\nprint('Token totals (I/O/R/CR/CW):', cur.fetchone())\n\n# Duration stats\ncur.execute('SELECT AVG(time_updated-time_created),MAX(time_updated-time_created),MIN(CASE WHEN time_updated>time_created THEN time_updated-time_created END) FROM session')\navg,max,min = cur.fetchone()\nprint(f'Duration: avg={avg/1000:.1f}s max={max/1000:.1f}s min={min/1000:.1f}s')\n\n# Sessions per day\ncur.execute(\\\"SELECT date(time_created/1000,'unixepoch') as d,COUNT(*) FROM session GROUP BY d ORDER BY d\\\")\nprint('Sessions per day:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall(): print(f'  {r[0]}: {r[1]}')\n\n# Top costs\ncur.execute('SELECT id,slug,ROUND(cost,2),model,tokens_input+tokens_output FROM session WHERE cost>0 ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 10')\nprint('Top costs:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall(): print(f'  {r[1] or r[0][:20]:30s} cost={r[2]} model={r[3] or \\\"?\\\"} tokens={r[4]}')\n\n# Cost per model\ncur.execute('SELECT COALESCE(model,\\\"?\\\"),ROUND(SUM(cost),2),COUNT(*),ROUND(AVG(cost),4) FROM session WHERE cost>0 GROUP BY model ORDER BY SUM(cost) DESC')\nprint('Cost per model:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall(): print(f'  {r[0]:30s} total={r[1]} sessions={r[2]} avg={r[3]}')\n\n# Agent types\ncur.execute('SELECT agent,COUNT(*) FROM session WHERE agent IS NOT NULL GROUP BY agent ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC')\nprint('Agent types:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall(): print(f'  {r[0]}: {r[1]}')\n\"",
  "description": "Explore cost, token, duration data"
}

bashcompletedMore time-series data exploration▶
Input
{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport sqlite3\nconn = sqlite3.connect('/root/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db')\ncur = conn.cursor()\n\n# Messages per day\ncur.execute(\\\"SELECT date(time_created/1000,'unixepoch') as d,COUNT(*) FROM message GROUP BY d ORDER BY d\\\")\nprint('Messages per day:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall(): print(f'  {r[0]}: {r[1]}')\n\n# Messages per hour (0-23)\ncur.execute(\\\"SELECT CAST(strftime('%H',time_created/1000,'unixepoch') AS INTEGER) as h,COUNT(*) FROM message GROUP BY h ORDER BY h\\\")\nprint('Messages by hour:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall(): print(f'  {r[0]:2d}:00  {r[1]}')\n\n# Sessions with more info\ncur.execute('SELECT id,slug,directory,model,agent,ROUND((time_updated-time_created)/60000.0,1),tokens_input,tokens_output,tokens_reasoning FROM session WHERE slug IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time_created DESC LIMIT 5')\nprint('Recent sessions:')\nfor r in cur.fetchall():\n    print(f'  {r[0][:15]} slug={str(r[1])[:25]:25s} dir={str(r[2])[:20]:20s} model={str(r[3])[:20]:20s} agent={r[4]} dur={r[5]}min in={r[6]} out={r[7]} reas={r[8]}')\n\n# Token summary across all\ncur.execute('SELECT SUM(tokens_input),SUM(tokens_output),SUM(tokens_reasoning),SUM(tokens_cache_read),SUM(tokens_cache_write),SUM(COALESCE(tokens_input,0)+COALESCE(tokens_output,0)+COALESCE(tokens_reasoning,0)) FROM session')\ni,o,r,cr,cw,total = cur.fetchone()\nprint(f'Total tokens: {total:,} (in={i:,} out={o:,} reasoning={r:,} cache_read={cr:,} cache_write={cw:,})')\n\"",
  "description": "More time-series data exploration"
}
